video_subject: A young Indian girl with long black hair in traditional braids, wearing a deep navy blue school tunic over a cream-colored collared shirt. She has a contemplative, slightly saddened expression, sculpted with expressive clay realism.
motion_dynamics: Subtle 12fps stop-motion jitter; the character slowly tilts her head down while her eyelids blink with a slight clay-drag effect; organic tactile movement.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: The girl looks directly ahead with a solemn expression, hands resting at her sides.
4s: She begins to slowly lower her gaze, her clay eyelids mid-blink, showing the tactile texture of the sculpt.
8s: She looks down completely, a soft shadow falling across her face as the background character in a plaid shirt passes by.
visual_style: Premium cinematic claymation with authentic Indian cultural details. Visible handcrafted clay fingerprints on the skin surfaces, tactile putty textures, soft domestic indoor lighting, shallow depth of field with a blurred background.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, 3D CGI, smooth plastic textures, generic anime style.
